REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter is ordered off calendar. Status on close of Estate is set for November 4, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Continued To Apr-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
George Stemerman for petitioner Goldman Sachs Trust Co.

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Status of Administration.

The Court noted that procedural issues identified in the tentative ruling remained outstanding, including the absence of a prayer for relief and a proposed order. The Court further noted that the previously appointed probate referee, Shirley Yawitz, had retired and instructed counsel to file and lodge an ex parte application for appointment of a new probate referee.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to April 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow petitioner to address the outstanding procedural issues and to seek appointment of a new probate referee.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Aug-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 30, 2012 and the codicil dated May 29, 2014 are admitted to probate. The Goldman Sachs Trust Co., N.A. is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
